title.en: This half-step domain ancestor is the Zhenyu Da...

content.en:
The Heavenly Emperor Palace was originally in the vast sea realm was to collect offerings, but the vast sea realm belonged to the ancestors of the vast sea and the Heavenly Emperor Palace, at that time, no one dared to object to the collection of offerings, and no one said anything.

But now, this is the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace still wants to act like this, how can other forces be willing?

Rumble!!!!

A half-step domain ancestor consciousness incarnation descended and approached the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

This half-step domain ancestor is the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor!

"Qinglong Palace Master, your Heavenly Emperor Palace is too domineering, why do you want us to offer resources? This is the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, not the Vast Sea Realm!"

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor said coldly.

Wow!

The Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace appeared and sneered: "Why, you used to be under the jurisdiction of our Heavenly Emperor Palace, and now that you have come to the Daoshan Realm, you want to break away from our Heavenly Emperor Palace? As for why, then let me tell you, the Heavenly Emperor Palace relies on strength!"

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor smiled and said, "I admit that the strength of your Heavenly Emperor Palace far surpasses that of the Nine Heavenly Forces, but now without the Domain Ancestor, you are not a legendary-level force. Your Heavenly Emperor Palace now only has three half-step domain ancestors, but in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, apart from your Heavenly Emperor Palace, there are more than three half-step domain ancestors!"

He was threatening the Heavenly Emperor Palace, which angered everyone, and all the half-step domain ancestors united, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace couldn't compete.

"Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, are you threatening me?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said coldly.

"Don't dare!" Zhenyu Dao Ancestor arched his hand slightly, "I'm just talking to the Lord of the Green Dragon Palace about the benefits, but I don't mean to threaten the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

"Do you think our Heavenly Emperor Palace can't kill you?"

The Qinglong Palace Lord was very angry, when did a mere half-step domain ancestor dare to threaten the Heavenly Emperor Palace?

"Of course, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has the ability to kill me, but can it kill our three half-step domain ancestors?"

As soon as the words of the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor fell, the breath of two half-step domain ancestors emerged.

Rushing!!!!

The two incarnations of the half-step domain ancestors descended and came to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

These two people are the half-step domain ancestor of the Mitian Sect - Migu Dao Ancestor, and the other is the half-step domain ancestor of the Tianhai Sect - Tianfa Dao Ancestor!

The Qinglong Palace Lord carefully stared at the Migu Dao Ancestor and the Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor, and quickly recognized them.

"Migu Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor, I didn't expect you two to also step into the half-step domain ancestor realm!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was a little surprised.

At this time, he finally understood why the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor was so confident, when the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor met the Zhenwu Palace Master, he didn't have such a strong confidence.

Now, the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor has reached some kind of cooperation agreement with the Migu Dao Ancestor and the Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor, and the three half-step domain ancestors have joined forces to fight against the three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"Interesting, you think that the number of half-step domain ancestors is the same as our Heavenly Emperor Palace, and they can compete with our Heavenly Emperor Palace, and today I will let you know that the half-step domain ancestor and the half-step domain ancestor are also different!"

"I alone am enough to suppress you!"

The Qinglong Palace Lord snorted coldly.

Rumble!

The momentum belonging to the half-step domain ancestor opened wildly, instantly shattering the incarnations of the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, the Migu Dao Ancestor and the Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor, and immediately headed towards the true bodies of the three half-step domain ancestors.

Bang!!!!

The true bodies of Migu Dao Ancestor, Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, and Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor all walked out of the sect and fought with the Qinglong Palace Lord in the Endless Void.

They also wanted to know how powerful the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, who had not made a move for countless years, was.

And this battle has also attracted too many Dao Ancestors to observe, as for the True Ancestor level, I'm sorry, I don't even have the qualifications to observe.

Once the True Ancestor dares to observe a battle of this level, a wisp of breath can cause damage to them regardless of the distance across time and space, unless it is the Supreme True Ancestor who is qualified to observe such a battle.

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor They thought that they could have an advantage by fighting three against one, but they found that they were wrong.

As the Qinglong Palace Lord said, there is also a gap between the half-step domain ancestor and the half-step domain ancestor.

"Ninety percent forbidden body, how did you do it?"

The Dao Ancestor of the Zhenyu Domain looked at the Qinglong Palace Lord who was urging the ninety percent forbidden body to continue to fight and fight, and said in shock.

Although the three of them were half-step domain ancestors who were also Dacheng forbidden bodies, they had only been tempered to the level of eighty percent, not because they didn't want to continue refining, but because it was too difficult and too difficult.

After refining eighty percent of the forbidden body, it seems to have fallen into shackles, no matter how many forbidden strange things or even forbidden treasures are refined, there is no way to continue refining the forbidden body.

But the Qinglong Palace Master actually refined the forbidden body to ninety percent, what a rebellion against the sky!

"Ignorance, how can you imagine the essence of our Heavenly Emperor Palace?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord sneered.

The strength of the Blue Dragon Palace Lord is not only in the ninety percent forbidden body, but the forbidden Dao power in the whole body is also extremely pure, as if it has been completely transformed into the power of the dark taboo.

In addition, the Qinglong Palace Master also has mastered many forbidden dao techniques, and the forbidden dao is also very profound, far from being comparable to the powerhouses who have just entered the half-step domain ancestor.

Although the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, Migu Dao Ancestor, and Tianfan Dao Ancestor were not half-step domain ancestors who had just entered, they were still too immature compared to the Qinglong Palace Lord.

The half-step domain ancestor's fight was not very gorgeous, some were just hand-to-hand combat, and a casual blow was a perfect use of the forbidden power, far surpassing those so-called supreme Dao techniques.

Ye Tian was also observing this battle, and he was very fascinated by it, and the combat skills seemed to surpass the Great Dao and surpass everything.

I have to say that the gap between him and these half-step domain ancestors is really big and big, not in strength, but in realm.

Rumble!

The Lord of the Qinglong Palace hammered the Dao Ancestor of the Zhen Domain with one fist, and then kicked the Dao Ancestor of the Ancient Realm, and with a blow to his body, he directly knocked the Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor upside down and flew into countless territories.

The battle of the four half-step domain ancestors gradually entered the space-time turbulence, and set off a space-time storm in the space-time turbulence.

And at this time, there are even fewer people who can enter the turbulence of time and space to observe, and they are basically relatively powerful Dao Ancestors.

With the passage of time, the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, Migu Dao Ancestor, and Tianfan Dao Ancestor actually began to have injuries, which was enough to prove that the Qinglong Palace Lord really had the strength to kill them alone.

Of course, it was also more difficult for the Qinglong Palace Lord to kill any of them as a half-step domain ancestor, and the half-step domain ancestor was not so easy to kill.

Abrupt.

Zhenyu Daozu took out his own forbidden weapon, which was a top-level forbidden weapon.

Migu Daozu and Heavenly Brahma Daozu were no exception, and they also took out forbidden weapons, ranking among the top ones.

The three half-step domain ancestors used top-level forbidden weapons, and their strength skyrocketed, and they were able to compete with the Qinglong Palace Lord at once.

"Hehe, do you think you have a forbidden weapon?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord sneered.

Immediately, he took out a sword, which contained the aura of the Domain Ancestor.

As soon as this sword came out, the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, the Migu Dao Ancestor, and the Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor all changed their expressions, and they all exclaimed in unison:

"Semi-Domain!!!
